textByHash.56b3ce7ab930018d0523cd3504667c999bcaff80: As it happens, a recent discovery of dragon limbs has allowed the creation of such a crossbow.
textByHash.6e67ef81854eed4f25e13eacd99cdb321c45a858: A fair day, traveller. Would you like to see my wares?
textByHash.8d627d75306cd10cf36f4a77e6a8ba5424b5d03c: Ahh crossbows. Not exactly what I'd call skilled ranging, but I guess dwarven engineering is good, what did you want to know?
textByHash.94aa9c58a22553a4353036f09984ead65db489ff: I don't... however I will look into it when I get spare time, for now you'll have to stick with the dwarven way of doing things.
